summary: Backend refactoring verification complete. Fixed 5 bugs in router files introduced during the refactoring from monolithic server.py to modular routers. All 36 API endpoint tests now pass (100%).
passed_tests: GET /api/health - Health check returns 200 with status=healthy
GET /api/ - Root endpoint returns API info with version 2.0.0
POST /api/auth/register - Creates new user with analyst role
POST /api/auth/login - Returns token for valid credentials
GET /api/auth/me - Returns current user when authenticated
POST /api/threats - Creates new threat with active status
GET /api/threats/{id} - Returns specific threat by ID
POST /api/alerts - Creates new alert with new status
updated_files: /app/backend/routers/websocket.py - Fixed: removed await from sync methods get_stats() and get_connected_agents()
/app/backend/routers/timeline.py - Fixed: build_timeline() takes only threat_id, not threat object; used correct method signatures
/app/backend/routers/quarantine.py - Fixed: quarantine functions are sync not async; added proper dataclass conversion
/app/backend/routers/response.py - Fixed: get_stats() should be get_response_stats(); get_blocked_ips() is sync
/app/backend/routers/audit.py - Fixed: get_logs() should be search(); search returns dicts not dataclasses
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend refactoring from monolithic server.py (2700+ lines) to 17 modular routers is complete and verified. All API endpoints work correctly. Fixed 5 bugs in router files where method signatures or async/sync mismatches occurred during refactoring. The routers are: auth, threats, alerts, ai_analysis, dashboard, network, hunting, honeypots, reports, agents, quarantine, settings, response, audit, timeline, websocket, openclaw.

websocket_router.issue: get_stats() and get_connected_agents() were being awaited but are sync methods
websocket_router.fix: Removed await keyword from both method calls

timeline_router.issue: build_timeline() was called with 2 args (threat_id, threat) but only takes 1 arg (threat_id)
timeline_router.fix: Updated to call build_timeline(threat_id) only; used asdict() for response conversion

quarantine_router.issue: Quarantine functions (list_quarantined, get_quarantine_summary, etc.) are sync but were being awaited
quarantine_router.fix: Removed await; added asdict() conversion for dataclass entries

response_router.issue: Called response_engine.get_stats() but method is get_response_stats(); get_blocked_ips() is sync
response_router.fix: Changed to get_response_stats(); removed await from get_blocked_ips()

audit_router.issue: Called audit.get_logs() but method is search(); search returns dicts not dataclasses
audit_router.fix: Changed to audit.search(); removed asdict() conversion since search returns dicts

mocked_integrations.external_services: Twilio SMS, Slack webhooks, SendGrid email, Elasticsearch, OpenClaw AI - require user API keys
